name: ai-ding
description: Cross-platform notifications for Codex CLI — desktop, sound, Telegram, Bark, Slack, email, and more.

interface.longDescription: ai-ding adds cross-platform notifications to Codex with a notify skill, repo-level hooks, and a personal install flow that wires marketplace discovery plus Stop-event alerts.
defaultPrompt: Use notify to alert me when this task completes.
Send a notification that the build finished.
